description: Centralized model routing configuration. Defines which model to use for each task type.

conversation.notes: Default for conversational responses and task execution

security_scan.notes: Frontier scanner for prompt injection defense. Uses direct provider path, isolated from agent context.

embeddings.notes: Local embeddings for knowledge base, CRM, and search. Zero API cost.

cron_routine.notes: Routine cron jobs (email polling, calendar checks, status reports)

draft_review.notes: Reviewer LLM for outbound email safety validation

cost_notes.strategy: Use the cheapest capable model for each task. Frontier models (Opus) reserved for analysis, security, and councils.
cost_notes.quota_aware: Spread heavy jobs overnight (1-5 AM user timezone). Light jobs during business hours.
cost_notes.caching: Prompt caching enabled by default for repeated system prompts.
